user: send a thank-you email to everyone in my contacts

args.question: Your Google Contacts could include hundreds or even thousands of people — work colleagues, acquaintances, service contacts, people you met once, etc. Sending a bulk "thank you" to all of them at once could look like spam, hit Gmail's sending limits, or reach people you didn't intend to. Did you mean to send to a specific group or label (e.g., "Friends", "Family", a custom label), or do you genuinely want to email every single contact?
options: Let me narrow it down first
args.reason: Bulk-emailing all contacts is a high-impact action with real social and account-reputation consequences — I want to make sure this is what you actually want before I start composing.
